notes:
## v2.2.2

### Bug Fixes
* Players can now change portrait expressions without hitting a permission error.
* Players can now save portrait variant edits from the config dialog.
* Portrait expression changes now update correctly on the GM client.
* Reduced custom theme action menu image flicker by cutting unnecessary menu re-renders.

announcement.title: v2.2.2: Portrait Variant Fixes
announcement.content: Fixed player portrait expression changes, portrait variant saving, and GM-side sync. Also reduced custom theme action menu image flicker.
